industry.headline: UPERC Approves 20 MW Floating Solar Project in Gorakhpur
industry.summary: Uttar Pradesh Electricity Regulatory Commission (UPERC) cleared a 20 MW floating solar project at Chilwa Tal in Gorakhpur, Uttar Pradesh, under a cost-plus tariff. UPPCL will procure power from the project developed by Coal India (CIL).

industry.summary: Central Electricity Regulatory Commission (CERC) denied a wind developer’s request to exit obligations under a 200 MW SECI wind power project.

tech.headline: Huawei's FusionSolar9.0 Aims to Reduce LCOE for Utility Projects
tech.summary: Huawei Digital Power launched FusionSolar9.0, a utility-scale solar solution designed to optimize lifecycle yield and lower LCOE. Zhang Xingzhong, president of Huawei's utility solar business, stated the system enhances performance and cost-efficiency for large-scale power plants.

tech.headline: Fraunhofer IWU Storage Analyzer Cuts Factory Peak Loads
tech.summary: Fraunhofer IWU developed an energy storage systems in production (ESiP) analyzer that enables factories to use nearly half of their on-site generated electricity. The technology helps reduce peak loads by optimizing energy storage and usage in manufacturing environments.
tech.searchQuery: Fraunhofer IWU storage analyzer reduces peak loads 2026

tech.headline: JinkoSolar Achieves 34.82% Perovskite-Silicon Tandem Efficiency
tech.summary: JinkoSolar reached 34.82% efficiency for a perovskite-silicon tandem solar cell, validated by China's Shanghai Institute of Microsystem and Information Technology. This result highlights progress in tandem cell technology for higher solar energy conversion rates.

tech.headline: ARENA Allocates AU$95.4M to Extend ACAP to 2033
tech.summary: Australia's ARENA committed AU$95.4 million (US$66.8 million) to extend the Australian Centre for Advanced Photovoltaics (ACAP) until 2033. The funding supports ongoing photovoltaic research and development under the program's expanded operational timeline.

tech.headline: Battery-Free Artificial Photosynthesis for Solar Fuel
tech.summary: Osaka Metropolitan University scientists developed a battery-free artificial photosynthesis system. The system self-regulates energy output without external electronics or batteries. It uses a solid electrolyte to adapt to sunlight fluctuations. This innovation promises cheaper and cleaner solar fuel production. The technology eliminates reliance on external power sources for energy management. The breakthrough could revolutionize sustainable energy generation and storage methods. The research highlights advancements in autonomous energy systems and renewable resource utilization.

tech.headline: Wallbox Launches Pulsar Pro to Simplify EV Charging Reimbursement
tech.summary: Wallbox has announced the launch of the new Pulsar Pro, the latest evolution of its AC charging portfolio. This solution is designed to simplify EV charging reimbursement as electric vehicle adoption continues to grow and charging becomes increasingly distributed across homes. The company is a leading provider of energy management solutions and electric vehicle charging.
